text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And then, Prez said another of her<n>jokes...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I just remembered the last joke of hers<n>you told
me... Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's funny! "Teio, you're shining... They<n>glow up so
fast." Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Her jokes are great... Really<n>remind me of
home.
